title: Wrong modport directionality accross scopes doesn't trigger an error

features.name: interface with modport declaring input-directioned signals
features.description: Code should include an interface with a modport that declares one or more signals with input direction
features.snippet: interface ctrl_if; logic data; logic valid; modport mp(input data, input valid); endinterface

features.name: cross_scope_access_to_modport_signals
features.description: Code should include a submodule that receives an interface through its modport and accesses signals from a different scope level
features.snippet: module sub(ctrl_if.mp ctrl); logic data; assign data = ctrl.data; endmodule

features.name: procedural_assignment_to_input_only_modport_signal
features.description: Code should include a procedural (always_ff) non-blocking assignment that drives a signal declared as input-only in a modport interface
